• Property name & SG code
• V&V status & current step

• Latest notifications

Email, Phone
Property Reference (optional)

System: auto-match
PublicUser to existing
PropertyOwner
(by ID number / email)

(no auto-match found)

span.p:
Officer links to existing
or creates new PropertyOwner
(PublicUserProperty Status = Approved)

PublicUser Status = Active
MFA mandatory before case access
